title: Bravura
content:
Memory as embankment,
        a mudslide at High Tide
        with shades up...
        my avocado green brethren
        pleasures the soil.

        Memory as enchantment
        a Belle at a Soiree,
        pureed, Gaston at a Dinner Party.

        Napanee suggests sympathy,
        a serendipity...
        as water winders its way
        to clay in a moonlight
        turn of the bottle,
        I shall find a way.
        that's ironclad.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Bravura"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
